criteria.name: keyboard_reaches_everything
criteria.description: Every interactive control — queue entries and checkboxes, rating buttons, sliders, class picker, region list actions, review-state controls, undo and redo, and all form fields — is reachable and operable with the keyboard alone
criteria.reasoning: Native controls and sliders with tabindex were traversed using repeated Tab navigation. Evidence: A11Y-shared.png

criteria.name: dialogs_trap_and_return_focus
criteria.description: The class form, confirmation dialogs, and the dispute form trap focus while open, close on Escape, and return focus to the control that opened them
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: The class dialog was observed trapping focus and returning focus on Escape, but confirmation and dispute dialogs were not fully reachable for verification. Evidence: DIALOG-shared.png

criteria.name: icons_and_images_labeled
criteria.description: Icon-only controls (thumbs, undo/redo, zoom, icon picker entries) carry accessible names, and attached images carry descriptive alt text
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Several visible icon-only navigation and toolbar buttons have no accessible name, although the image has descriptive alt text. Evidence: A11Y-shared.png

criteria.name: live_announcements
criteria.description: Submitting an annotation, the completion of an assist run, a step entering the failed state, and a successful Import are announced through an aria-live region as well as shown visually
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: After starting an assist run, the aria-live status and alert regions remained empty while the run was visibly active. Evidence: LIVE-shared.png

criteria.name: labeled_form_fields
criteria.description: Every form field has a visible label, and validation messages are associated with their fields so each names the field it belongs to
criteria.reasoning: Visible labels were observed for the comment, metadata, checkbox, slider, and class-builder fields; slider fields use aria-labelledby. Evidence: A11Y-shared.png

criteria.name: heading_order_logical
criteria.description: Headings follow a logical order with no skipped levels across the views
criteria.reasoning: Observed headings follow H1, H2 sections, and nested H3 subsections without skipped levels. Evidence: A11Y-shared.png

criteria.name: landmarks_present
criteria.description: The page exposes landmark structure (navigation for the sidebar, main for the content area) for assistive navigation
criteria.reasoning: The page exposes navigation landmarks, a complementary queue landmark, and a main content landmark. Evidence: A11Y-shared.png

criteria.name: contrast_sufficient
criteria.description: Text and controls meet sufficient color contrast, including state chips, badges, and text over the light-gray response tile
criteria.reasoning: Observed state chips, badges, controls, and the light-gray response tile use visibly high-contrast text and backgrounds. Evidence: A11Y-shared.png

criteria.name: semantic_controls
criteria.description: Buttons, checkboxes, sliders, and tabs use semantic elements or correct ARIA roles rather than bare styled divs
criteria.reasoning: Buttons, native checkboxes, tabs, combobox, select, and ARIA slider controls were observed rather than bare interactive divs. Evidence: A11Y-shared.png

criteria.name: state_not_color_only
criteria.description: Review states and disagreement flags are conveyed by text or icon plus color, never color alone
criteria.reasoning: Review states are conveyed with text such as Unlabeled, Labeled, Reviewed, and Disputed alongside visual styling. Evidence: A11Y-shared.png

criteria.name: multi_facet_reload_reset

criteria.reasoning: Reload after annotation, dispute, and taxonomy setup returned seeded counts, baseline taxonomy, empty history changes, and no persisted edits. Evidence: multi_facet_reload_reset-shared.png

criteria.name: tier_and_history_ordering_live

criteria.name: agreement_summary_input_sensitivity

criteria.name: undo_redo_controls_and_shortcuts
criteria.description: Undo and Redo appear in the toolbar, respond to Ctrl+Z and Ctrl+Shift+Z (Cmd variants on macOS), and each control is disabled when its stack is empty
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Undo and Redo controls were visible and initially disabled, but both keyboard shortcut behaviors were not completed. Evidence: seeded_queue_groups_and_badges-shared.png

criteria.name: undo_restores_complete_state
criteria.description: Undo after a submitted annotation, a skip, a bulk action, a region change, a taxonomy edit, or a review-state change restores the exact prior state: queue counts, badges, chips, and the export preview all return to their previous values
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Undo was not activated after a graded state-changing workflow. Evidence: bulk_skip_moves_all_selected-shared.png

criteria.name: redo_and_stack_clearing
criteria.description: Redo reapplies the most recently undone action completely, a new action after an undo clears the redo stack, and a history panel lists recent actions with human-readable labels (such as Submitted annotation, Skipped 3 items) where undoing visibly removes or marks the reverted entry
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Redo and history-stack clearing were not fully exercised. Evidence: bulk_skip_moves_all_selected-shared.png

criteria.name: annotation_history_tab
criteria.description: The History tab lists all submitted annotations with response summary, binary rating, and date; clicking one opens a read-only view of the saved ratings, comments, metadata values, and any region boxes, and new submissions appear immediately while undone ones disappear
criteria.reasoning: History increased after submission and the read-only annotation view showed rating, scores, comments, metadata, and regions. Evidence: annotation_history_tab-shared.png

criteria.name: jsonl_download_shape
criteria.description: The Download JSONL button above the queue exports all completed annotations as a JSONL file where each line is a JSON object with prompt, response, binary rating, dimension scores, and comments
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: JSONL download was available, but the downloaded artifact contents were not directly verified in the browser. Evidence: seeded_queue_groups_and_badges-shared.png

criteria.name: export_view_labels_package_shape
criteria.description: The Export view shows a live-compiled monospaced preview with Labels JSON and Stats summary tabs where Labels JSON is a LabelsPackage: schemaVersion exactly annotation-studio-labels-v1, taxonomy (id, name, color, icon, shortcut, attributes), metadataFields, and items (id, suite, review_state in unlabeled|labeled|reviewed|disputed, annotation null when unlabeled else AnnotationCreate with rating up|down, scores Accuracy/Clarity/Relevance integers 1–5, comment ≤500, metadata keyed by field name, regions with classId and x/y/w/h); these field names and enums are visible in the preview text, and submitting an annotation, resolving a dispute, or adding a region changes the corresponding preview values without a reload
criteria.reasoning: Export visibly showed the LabelsPackage schema version, taxonomy, metadataFields, items, review_state, annotation fields, scores, metadata, and regions; submitted values appeared live. Evidence: export_view_labels_package_shape-shared.png

criteria.name: annotation_create_field_contract
criteria.description: Submit & Next produces an AnnotationCreate payload with rating exactly up or down, scores.Accuracy/Clarity/Relevance integers 1–5, comment at most 500 characters, metadata keyed by field name, and regions as RegionCreate objects; invalid rating, scores, comment length, or metadata kind blocks submit with an inline message naming the offending field and leaves the queue unchanged
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: A valid payload was visible in export, but invalid rating/score/comment/metadata blocking behavior was not fully exercised. Evidence: export_view_labels_package_shape-shared.png

criteria.name: copy_export_exact_with_confirmation
criteria.description: The Copy export control puts the exact visible preview text on the clipboard and shows a visible confirmation (icon swap or toast) that reverts after a moment
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Copy export was visible, but clipboard equality and confirmation/reversion were not verified. Evidence: export_view_labels_package_shape-shared.png

criteria.name: stats_match_other_surfaces
criteria.description: The Stats summary's numbers match the rest of the app: suite progress equals the sidebar counts, the agreement percentage equals the Agreement view's figure, and the disputed count equals the Review queue's Disputed tier count
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Stats were not compared against all corresponding surfaces in one completed workflow. Evidence: export_view_labels_package_shape-shared.png

criteria.name: region_create_geometry_bounds
criteria.description: Drawing a region produces a RegionCreate with classId matching a taxonomy class, x/y ≥ 0, w/h ≥ 8, and x+w / y+h within image bounds; boxes with w or h below 8 are discarded; region attributeValues for select attributes use one of that attribute's options
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: A valid region was setup, but the required real drawing gesture, minimum-size discard, and bounds checks were not fully observed. Evidence: seeded_queue_groups_and_badges-shared.png

criteria.name: labels_package_import_round_trip
criteria.description: Import accepts a conforming LabelsPackage (schemaVersion annotation-studio-labels-v1) and restores taxonomy, metadata fields, annotations, regions, and review-state chips so History, Taxonomy, region lists, and the next Labels JSON preview match the imported document; Export then Import of the same Labels JSON reconstructs the same visible state
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Import and export round-trip were not completed. Evidence: export_view_labels_package_shape-shared.png

criteria.name: import_rejects_nonconforming_package
criteria.description: Import of malformed JSON or a LabelsPackage failing the field contract (missing schemaVersion/taxonomy/metadataFields/items, schemaVersion not annotation-studio-labels-v1, review_state or rating outside closed enums, score outside 1–5, or region classId absent from taxonomy) shows a visible error naming the offending field and leaves taxonomy, annotations, and review states unchanged
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: No malformed or nonconforming import was submitted. Evidence: export_view_labels_package_shape-shared.png

criteria.name: dispute_create_reason_contract
criteria.description: Dispute submits a DisputeCreate with reason 1–200 characters after trim as a single line; empty, over-length, or multi-line reason shows an inline message naming reason and changes no review state
criteria.reasoning: The Dispute reason dialog visibly rejected empty input and multiline input with inline Reason validation while leaving the item undisputed. Evidence: review_queue_tiers_live-shared.png

criteria.name: jsonl_line_full_field_contract
criteria.description: Each line of the downloaded JSONL is an AnnotationsJsonlLine object carrying all seven required keys — prompt, response, rating (up or down), scores (object with Accuracy, Clarity, and Relevance integers 1–5), comment (string of at most 500 characters), metadata (object keyed by field name), and regions (array of RegionCreate objects) — including for annotations that carried metadata values or region boxes
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: JSONL lines were not downloaded and inspected in the browser. Evidence: seeded_queue_groups_and_badges-shared.png

criteria.name: spacing_follows_scale
criteria.description: Spacing and sizing follow a consistent design-system scale with no arbitrary one-off values dominating computed styles
criteria.reasoning: Consistent 16px/32px/48px/64px-style spacing and control sizing are visible across the desktop layout. Evidence: layout-shared.png

criteria.name: typography_matches_spec
criteria.description: Typography matches the specified hierarchy for the app title, panel headings, and body text
criteria.reasoning: Rendered typography shows a clear IBM Plex Sans hierarchy: large app title, distinct section headings, and smaller body/support text. Evidence: layout-shared.png

criteria.name: layout_matches_spec
criteria.description: The realized layout matches the specified anatomy: left queue sidebar, toolbar view switcher, card with prompt/image/response/rating/sliders/comments/metadata order, and side-by-side region list
criteria.reasoning: Desktop view visibly includes the left queue sidebar, toolbar view switcher, ordered annotation card sections, and side-by-side image/region-list area. Evidence: layout-shared.png

criteria.name: specified_transitions_present
criteria.description: The transitions the spec calls out (250ms card advance, 150ms rating fill, chip color transitions, copy confirmation) are present on their state changes
criteria.reasoning: Computed styles directly show a 250ms annotation-card transition, 150ms chip and rating-button transitions, and 150ms copy-snippet transition. Evidence: layout-shared.png

criteria.name: responsive_behavior_per_spec
criteria.description: Responsive behavior matches the spec: 768px sidebar collapse and 375px no-overflow rule
criteria.reasoning: At 768px the sidebar is translated off-canvas and the main view expands; at 375px the sidebar remains collapsed and the rendered page has no horizontal overflow. Evidence: responsive-768.png; responsive-375.png

criteria.name: control_shape_conformance
criteria.description: Button and form radii, padding, and shadows are consistent with the component system in use
criteria.reasoning: Buttons and form controls use a consistent Carbon-style square treatment, predictable padding, and matching focus/hover shadows. Evidence: layout-shared.png

criteria.name: hierarchy_distinct
criteria.description: Section headings are clearly distinct from body text throughout
criteria.reasoning: Section headings such as Original prompt, Model response, Rubric scores, and Custom metadata are visibly distinct from body copy through size and weight. Evidence: layout-shared.png

criteria.name: component_states_match
criteria.description: Component states (default, hover, focus, disabled, error) match the specified treatments where specified
criteria.reasoning: Observed default, hovered, active/selected, and disabled states have distinct treatments; the Submit & Next control is visibly disabled and the hovered Up control gains a blue wash and shadow. Evidence: states-shared.png

criteria.name: color_treatments_precise
criteria.description: The specified color mappings are precise: brand blue selection, state-chip mapping, class-color consistency, warning treatment on flagged rows
criteria.reasoning: Active selections use brand blue, state chips use a consistent neutral mapping, and the image visibly uses distinct class colors; the selected queue/suite rows also use blue emphasis. Evidence: states-shared.png

criteria.name: microinteraction_durations
criteria.description: Microinteraction feedback follows the specified durations within reasonable tolerance (roughly 150 to 300 milliseconds)
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Several observed control feedback transitions are 70ms or slider-fill transitions are 110ms, outside the specified roughly 150–300ms range despite the 150ms/250ms transitions elsewhere. Evidence: states-shared.png

criteria.name: double_submit_single_save
criteria.description: Double-activating Submit & Next saves exactly one annotation: the queue count decrements by one and history gains one entry
criteria.reasoning: Double-activating Submit & Next produced one new history entry (History 6→7) and one queue decrement (3 completed, 9 remaining). Evidence: double_submit_single_save-shared.png

criteria.name: skip_all_then_proceed
criteria.description: Skipping every item in a suite leaves the queue showing the same items in skip order with the skipped badge equal to the number of skips, and submitting then proceeds from the front of the reordered queue
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Reordering all remaining items did not visibly show skipped badges or a reordered queue; the visible queue remained in its original order. Evidence: double_submit_single_save-shared.png

criteria.name: empty_stacks_disable_undo_redo
criteria.description: Undo with an empty history and Redo with an empty redo stack are disabled; activating them does nothing and produces no console errors
criteria.reasoning: Undo and Redo were visibly disabled at empty-stack state; console inspection found zero errors. Evidence: empty_stacks_disable_undo_redo-shared.png

criteria.name: sliver_box_discarded

criteria.reasoning: A real 1-pixel drag left Regions at 0 and displayed “Region discarded: width and height must each be at least 8 image pixels.” Evidence: sliver_box_discarded-shared.png

criteria.name: last_region_delete_empty_state
criteria.description: Deleting the last region on an item leaves the image visible with an empty region list and a short empty-state line explaining how to draw a region
criteria.reasoning: Deleting the final region left the image visible, Regions 0, and the instruction “No regions yet. Arm a class, then drag a box on the image.” Evidence: last_region_delete_empty_state-shared.png

criteria.description: At exactly 500 characters the comments counter shows 0 remaining and further input is prevented, and the saved annotation shows the full 500-character comment in history

criteria.name: card_advance_transition

criteria.name: rating_fill_animation

criteria.name: queue_list_animations

criteria.name: assist_step_status_motion

criteria.name: region_box_motion

criteria.description: Selecting a suite, choosing thumbs-up, moving all three sliders, typing a comment, and pressing Submit & Next decrements that suite queue badge by exactly one, adds the item to the History tab, advances the card to the next item, and increases the Labels JSON preview annotation count by exactly one, all without a reload, with the new entry showing rating up, integer scores under Accuracy/Clarity/Relevance, and package schemaVersion annotation-studio-labels-v1
criteria.reasoning: Submitted a live annotation with Up rating, all three sliders moved, and a distinctive comment; History increased, the queue badge decremented, the card advanced, and submission toasts appeared. Evidence: annotate_end_to_end_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: invalid_forms_block_inline
criteria.description: Submitting the taxonomy class form or the metadata field form with missing or invalid required fields triggers immediate inline validation naming the field and changes no collection
criteria.reasoning: Invalid taxonomy shortcut showed inline “Shortcut must be exactly one digit…” validation, and clearing the metadata name showed “Name is required”; no records were added. Evidence: invalid_forms_block_inline-shared.png

criteria.name: taxonomy_edit_flows_through_labels
criteria.description: Creating a class with shortcut 7 and an icon makes it appear in the class picker; pressing 7 on an image item and dragging draws a box in its color, the box appears in the region list, and the Labels JSON preview then contains the class name in both the taxonomy definition and that item region entry
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Created Test Class with shortcut 7 and icon, and shortcut 7 armed the class, but the real drag gesture did not create a region or region-list entry. Evidence: taxonomy_edit_flows_through_labels-shared.png

criteria.name: assist_run_recovery_flow
criteria.description: Running Assist advances steps while the rollup counts up; a step that exhausts retries raises the failure count, its Retry control resumes from that step, pause then resume freezes and continues at the same step, the event timeline records the pause and resume in order, and accepting a Suggested rating fills the card so submitting decrements the queue like a manual annotation
criteria.reasoning: Assist visibly advanced, counted failures, exposed Retry failed step, pause/resume timeline entries, and accepting a Suggested rating populated scores and enabled submission. Evidence: assist_run_recovery_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: dispute_round_trip_flow
criteria.description: Flagging a disagreement row in the Agreement view moves that item to the top of the Review queue Disputed tier and increments the tier count by one; resolving it returns it to the Reviewed tier and the Stats summary disputed count and agreement figures update to match both views
criteria.reasoning: Flagging an Agreement disagreement raised the disputed count and placed the item at the top of Review queue; resolving moved it to Reviewed and updated the counts. Evidence: dispute_round_trip_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: bulk_undo_flow
criteria.description: Selecting three queue items and choosing Skip selected moves all three to the end and raises the skipped badge by three; Ctrl+Z restores all three positions, returns the badge to its prior value, and leaves the export preview counts exactly as before the bulk skip
criteria.reasoning: Three selected items were skipped with a “3 items moved to the end” toast, then Ctrl+Z restored the state; the selection and queue badge returned to their prior values. Evidence: bulk_undo_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: palette_navigation_flow

criteria.reasoning: Ctrl+K search opened SAF evaluation 04, and reopening the palette with “Agreement” selected Agreement view. Evidence: palette_navigation_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: sidebar_collapse_continuity

criteria.name: flows_recover_without_reload
